title: CHANGELOG + dogfood evidence — happy-path validation of E2/E3/E5 flows
description: Two deliverables: (1) CHANGELOG.md entry for rc.25 documenting all new behavior (5 entry points + new event type + AGENTS.md policy + doctor subcommand + hook copy fix); (2) dogfood-evidence.md capturing 3 manual happy-path runs (E2 explicit, E3 self-trigger, E5 cron simulated). Evidence includes screenshot-equivalent terminal logs + events.jsonl tail snippets showing session_archive_attempted writes.

files.change:
Insert new section '## [2.0.0-rc.25] - 2026-05-XX' with subsections:
  ### Added
  - `fab doctor --archive-history [--since=Nd]` — session-by-session archive attempt audit
  - `session_archive_attempted` event type in events.jsonl — tracks per-session archive outcomes (proposed | viability_failed | user_dismissed | skipped_no_signal)
  - fabric-archive Phase -0.5 Range Resolution — natural-language parsing for '今日复盘' / '上周' / 'rc.20' style invocations
  - AGENTS.md Self-archive policy — AI E3 self-trigger via 4 normative signals
  - E5 周期触发 documentation — /loop + OS cron samples in SKILL.md appendix
  ### Changed
  - archive-hint.cjs reason copy — now communicates cross-session count + project-level debt nature
  - fabric-archive Phase 0.0 — outcome-based re-scan filter with 12h anti-loop
  - fabric-archive Phase 0.4 — onboard trigger gate (E2-only execution)
  - fabric-archive Phase 0.5 — silent-skip path for E1/E3/E5 contexts
  ### Migration
  - Run `fab install` after upgrade to sync new AGENTS.md Self-archive policy to all client managed blocks
  - Old events.jsonl without session_archive_attempted entries — natural cold-start, no migration needed

Create with three happy-path scenarios:
  ## Scenario 1: E2 explicit invoke with range
  - Command: `/fabric-archive 上周的归档下`
  - Phase -0.5 parses 'past week' window
  - Phase 0.4 onboard prompts (E2 path)
  - Phase 0.5 viability gate evaluates
  - Phase 2 emits N pending entries
  - Phase 2.5 writes session_archive_attempted with outcome='proposed'
  - Evidence: actual terminal log + events.jsonl tail

  ## Scenario 2: E3 AI self-trigger
  - User says '以后 deepMerge 都得显式 array-append'
  - AI detects normative trigger, calls fabric-archive at turn end
  - Phase 0.4 SKIPPED (E3 entry)
  - Phase 0.5 viability gate PASS (explicit normative signal)
  - Phase 2 writes 1 guideline candidate
  - Phase 2.5 writes session_archive_attempted with outcome='proposed'
  - Evidence: AI reply showing '顺手归档:' template + pending file path

  ## Scenario 3: E5 cron daily-recap simulation
  - Manual: `claude code -p '/fabric-archive 今日复盘'`
  - Phase -0.5 parses 'today' window
  - Phase 0.0 finds today's session has no high-value events
  - Phase 0.5 viability gate FAILs (E5 path → silent-skip)
  - Phase 2.5 writes session_archive_attempted with outcome='skipped_no_signal'
  - No terminal noise
  - Evidence: events.jsonl tail snippet showing the silent write

implementation:
After all preceding TASKs pass (TASK-01 through TASK-11 complete), perform Scenario 1 manually:
  - In a fresh Claude Code session, type /fabric-archive 上周的归档下
  - Capture terminal output verbatim
  - tail -n 5 .fabric/events.jsonl after run, copy session_archive_attempted lines

Perform Scenario 2:
  - In Claude Code session, ask AI to do some work then say a normative statement
  - Observe AI's '顺手归档:' template at turn end
  - Verify pending file appears in .fabric/knowledge/pending/

Perform Scenario 3:
  - From shell: claude code -p '/fabric-archive 今日复盘' (or equivalent test invocation)
  - Verify silent exit (no terminal noise)
  - tail -n 5 .fabric/events.jsonl to verify session_archive_attempted was written
Write CHANGELOG entry with verbatim text per files[].change.
Write dogfood-evidence.md with the 3 scenarios + actual captured logs.

reference.pattern: rc.20 / rc.22 / rc.23 dogfood-evidence.md precedents — same structure
reference.examples: rc.22 dogfood-evidence.md is the most recent template — copy structure and substitute scenarios.

rationale.chosen_approach: Standard CHANGELOG + dogfood pattern from rc.22/rc.23. 3 scenarios cover the 3 most user-facing entry points (E2/E3/E5).
alternatives_considered: Skip dogfood (rejected: rc.20+ precedent established dogfood as gate)
Cover all 5 entry points (rejected: E1 is just hook fire which TASK-11 snapshot already covers; E4 is E2 sub-mode, redundant with Scenario 1)
decision_factors: User-facing entry points are the highest-risk for regression
Manual dogfood catches behavior the integration tests cannot mock
rationale.tradeoffs: Manual dogfood is time-consuming (~30 min); mitigation: only 3 scenarios + pre-existing terminal capture habits.

manual_checks: 3 dogfood scenarios all reach expected outcome
success_metrics: CHANGELOG entry added with all subsections
dogfood-evidence.md exists with 3 scenarios + actual captured logs
integration: 3 manual dogfood scenarios completed and logged

criteria: CHANGELOG.md mentions 'Self-archive policy' in Added section
CHANGELOG.md has Migration section mentioning `fab install`
dogfood-evidence.md exists with 3 H2 scenario sections
dogfood-evidence.md contains actual events.jsonl tail snippets (not placeholder)
